mapper.select: select product_id, product_style_name, product_name, totle_num, total_price, total_time from product where product_id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} and delete_flg = false

select product_id, product_style_name, product_name, totle_num, total_price, total_time from product where delete_flg = false
and product_style_name like CONCAT('%',#{productStyleName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
and product_name like CONCAT('%',#{productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
order by product_style_name,product_name
mapper.update:
update product
product_style_name = #{productStyleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
totle_num = #{totleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total_price = #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
total_Time = #{totalTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
update_date_time = current_timestamp
where product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and delete_flg = false

update product
delete_flg = true, update_date_time = current_timestamp
where product_id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} and delete_flg = false
mapper.insert: insert into product ( product_style_name, product_name, totle_num, total_price, total_time, create_date_time, update_date_time ) values ( #{productStyleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{totalTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
